epigraph.quote: We tottered over to the pub, the Freemason's Arms, for a drink before supper.

per_stop.quote: John had only learnt to ride a 2-wheeler a month before, & found it difficult at first, but by the end he was cycling very skilfully & leading the way.
We are camped in a lovely sheltered field near Broughton Hall, a Franciscan convent which is about to be sold.
Peter bought a blow-up foot ball + Eve bought her long-awaited clothes-line pole.
